name: Mismatched Memory Management Routines
description: The product attempts to return a memory resource to the system using a release function that is incompatible with the original allocation function, such as mixing malloc/delete or new/free, causing memory corruption or undefined behavior.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM(allocation_function_A) allocates memory, but TRANSFORM(deallocation_function_B) releases it using an incompatible routine. Look for mismatched pairs: malloc with delete, new with free, new[] with delete (not delete[]).
